mapper.update:
UPDATE clazz
name = #{name},
room = #{room},
begin_date = #{beginDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
master_id = #{masterId},
subject = #{subject},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select c.*, e.name master_name, (case when curdate() > c.end_date then '已结课' when c.begin_date > curdate() then '未开课' else '在读中' end) status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
c.name like concat('%',#{name}, '%')
and c.end_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by c.update_time desc
